test_edge_class_advanced.reason: Advanced class features: private methods, static blocks not fully implemented

test_edge_classes.reason: Class edge cases: getter/setter or inheritance dispatch issues

test_edge_complex_patterns.reason: Complex pattern matching edge cases in destructuring/spread

test_cli_simulation.reason: fs.readFileSync return-type divergence: Node returns Buffer (`<Buffer 6c 69 6e 65 ...>`), Perry returns string (`line1\nline2\n...`). Pre-existing — appeared between parity runs 2026-04-24 and 2026-04-25, predates v0.5.250's known_failures cleanup (HIR-only commit). Likely surfaces from a recent codegen commit (c4739341 cross-module getters/setters, or 3ba1188e FFI manifest); root-cause separately.

test_edge_control_flow.reason: Intermittent: failed in parity run 2026-04-25 but passed on isolated re-run with the same binary. Appeared alongside test_cli_simulation between the 2026-04-24 and 2026-04-25 runs. Possibly state-dependent on sibling tests or non-deterministic codegen path; investigate separately.

test_edge_error_handling.reason: Same flake family as test_edge_control_flow: failed in parity run 2026-04-25 but passed on isolated re-run with the same binary. Pre-existing, appeared between 2026-04-24 and 2026-04-25 parity runs.

test_gap_async_advanced.reason: Async generators, for-await-of, Promise.allSettled not implemented (segfault)

test_gap_class_advanced.reason: Private methods, static blocks not implemented

test_gap_console_methods.reason: console.trace stack frame format differs (Node JS call frames vs native C frames); timer values normalized by parity script

test_getters_setters.reason: Getter/setter dispatch issues in some patterns

test_super_calls.reason: Super call dispatch in deep inheritance chains

test_tls_connect.reason: Compile failure — TLS connect not implemented

test_closure_capture_types.reason: Closure box init: js_box_get null-pointer warnings on first read of captured locals before they're written

test_edge_closures.reason: Closure capture: same null-box pattern as test_closure_capture_types

test_edge_rest_spread_defaults.reason: Rest-parameter array elements interpreted as raw doubles instead of NaN-boxed strings (parts.join() prints scientific-notation numbers)

test_edge_scope_hoisting.reason: Closure capture order: js_box_get null-pointer warnings, then NaN result

test_gap_buffer_ops.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x. Likely SDK/linker version interaction; perry CLI itself is fine

test_gap_map_set_extended.reason: Map keying does not distinguish -0 from +0 (JS spec says they're the same key, but Map.has(0) after Map.set(-0, ...) differs from Node)

test_gap_node_crypto_buffer.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x. Same SDK gap as test_gap_buffer_ops

test_gap_typed_arrays.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x. Same SDK gap as test_gap_buffer_ops

test_stress_buffer.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x

test_stress_int_ops.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x

test_buffer_small_alloc.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x. Same SDK gap as test_gap_buffer_ops; exercises the #92 Buffer.alloc small-buffer slab fast path.

test_buffer_numeric_read_intrinsic.reason: Compile-fails on macOS-14 CI runner, passes locally on macOS 15.x. Same SDK gap as test_gap_buffer_ops; exercises the #92 Buffer numeric-read intrinsic.

test_stress_nanbox.reason: NaN-boxing edge cases: typeof undefined inside specific stress patterns differs (run-to-run noise possible)

test_stress_promises.reason: Promise resolve order under heavy concurrency — perry returns array values where Node returns scalar 42
